title: astragalus fendleri
intro: Astragalus fendleri, also known as Fendler's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae), native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, Astragalus fendleri has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and enhance overall well-being. Astragalus fendleri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of fatigue and chronic illness.
